name: Lumivara — intake-web
_notes: Reference template for Phase 2 of the admin portal.
Import into n8n, then: (1) set the GitHub credential on the 'Create GitHub Issue' node,
(2) set the Anthropic credential on the 'Structure with Claude' node,
(3) set the Resend credential on the 'Reply with magic link' node,
(4) set N8N_HMAC_SECRET as an env var on the n8n instance,
(5) activate the workflow and copy the webhook URL into Vercel as N8N_INTAKE_WEBHOOK_URL.
HMAC contract: header X-Lumivara-Signature: 't=<unix>,v1=<hex>' over '<unix>.<rawBody>', max 5 min skew.

parameters.subject: We got your request
parameters.html:
Thanks — we’ve logged your request and will reply as we make progress.

Open the dashboard →

Tracking: {{$json.issueUrl}}

name: Lumivara · Admin · Intake (web)

messages.content: You are an issue-structurer for the Lumivara admin portal. Take the client's raw request and produce a Markdown body with: ## Acceptance criteria (bullet list), ## Suggested labels (CSV from: priority/P1, priority/P2, priority/P3, complexity/trivial..complex, area/site, area/copy, area/infra, area/content, type/tech-site, type/business-lumivara). Always include the raw request verbatim under '## Original request' so a human can re-read source. Output JSON: {"title": string, "body": string, "suggestedLabels": string[]}

parameters.subject: We got it — tracking your request
parameters.html:
Got it. We're reviewing your request {{ $('Verify HMAC').item.json.title }}.

Live status: tap here.
